title: Verify latest funding payments shown in Activity — TAT-2057
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Activity shows funding payments up to today's date (no missing recent entries)
AC2: Multiple consecutive getFunding calls return consistent latest timestamp (no oscillation)
AC5: Refresh cycle produces identical results — cutoff date does not change across refreshes

setup-switch-account.description: Switch to 0x316BDE (bug's original account — 1174 records, well above 500-record API cap)

gate-wait-account.description: Wait for PerpsController accountState to load for new account

ac1-fetch-latest.description: Full 365-day fetch: count > 500 proves parallel pagination returns all records including recent ones
ac1-fetch-latest.expression: (function(){ return Engine.context.PerpsController.getFunding().then(function(r){ var last = r[r.length - 1]; var nowMs = Date.now(); var thirtyDaysMs = 2592000000; var isRecent = !!(last && (nowMs - last.timestamp) < thirtyDaysMs); return JSON.stringify({ count: r.length, latestTs: last ? last.timestamp : null, isRecent: isRecent, exceedsCap: r.length > 500 }) }) })()

ac1-screenshot.description: Screenshot funding tab showing latest entries

ac2-consistency-check.description: Two calls with fixed 2-day window — verify identical count and latest timestamp (no oscillation). Narrow window avoids rate-limit from back-to-back full 365-day fetches.
ac2-consistency-check.expression: (function(){ var nowMs = Date.now(); var twoDaysMs = 172800000; var opts = {}; opts.startTime = nowMs - twoDaysMs; opts.endTime = nowMs; return Engine.context.PerpsController.getFunding(opts).then(function(r1){ return Engine.context.PerpsController.getFunding(opts).then(function(r2){ var last1 = r1[r1.length - 1]; var last2 = r2[r2.length - 1]; var ts1 = last1 ? last1.timestamp : 0; var ts2 = last2 ? last2.timestamp : 0; return JSON.stringify({ count1: r1.length, count2: r2.length, latestTs1: ts1, latestTs2: ts2, consistent: r1.length === r2.length && ts1 === ts2 }) }) }) })()
